description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a macos-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Poetry, sets up Python 3.13.2 with Poetry caching, installs dependencies with Poetry, and then performs a series of steps to build and package a Python application, including installing universal versions of certain packages, building with PyInstaller, simplifying the Python bundle, copying scripts, building an installer, and uploading the build as an artifact named ykman-builds-macos.
